message:
feat(simd-lexer): add architecture feature gate, unified SWAR fallback matrix, and token witness log

Introduce SwarFeatureGate (Portable/RequireAvx2/RequireAvx512F/RequireNeon)
and ArchFamily enums for architecture-aware SWAR decisions. Consolidate
the old input-size fallback check into evaluate_swar_fallback_matrix()
which also gates on architecture profile and feature availability.

Extend ArchCapabilityProfile with per-ISA capability detection (AVX2,
AVX512F, NEON) using is_x86_feature_detected!/is_aarch64_feature_detected!.
Add LexerTokenWitnessLog for structured fallback and token determinism
auditing with SHA-256 content hashing. Scalar mode now explicitly reports
SwarDisableReason::OperatorOverride.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
